_meta.note: Seed registry of substrate classes the framework explicitly names or instances. Each class declares its cdv1/v9 anchors, class-conditions (with falsifiers), the API slots it can be expected to instance, and a gamut hint. Class membership is researcher-declared; the auditor uses this registry for slot-coverage queries and to render the Audit Library matrix. Gamut values are leading-order seeds and refine as instances land.

class_conditions.statement: Substrate's slow-resource memory kernel and load-arrival process share a single anomalous-diffusion exponent (so α_s = β_mem = heavy-traffic exponent).
class_conditions.falsifier: α_s (FDR aging-diagonal slope) and the heavy-traffic queueing exponent measured to differ while the substrate is in sustained s-regime holding.

class_conditions.statement: Trajectory is genuinely non-stationary — two-time correlations C(t,t') depend on both arguments, not just t−t' (history-dependent aging).
class_conditions.falsifier: Full time-translation invariance of C(t,t') observed across waiting times, with no aging signature.

classes.name: Surface-code quantum error correction

class_conditions.statement: Physical error rate is the operative control parameter; crossing the surface-code threshold migrates the gFDR locus s→r (the load-bearing positive cross-substrate instance per cdv1 §gFDR signatures).
class_conditions.falsifier: No s→r migration of the syndrome FDR signature across the physical-error threshold.

class_conditions.statement: Capacity wall is sharp / indicator-shaped: η(Γ*) = 1[|Γ*|≥c]. One uncorrectable error breaks the code.
class_conditions.falsifier: Observed soft Erlang-B-shaped η below threshold (substrate is then not surface-code-class).

class_conditions.statement: Raw syndrome stream is preprocessed to bounded-local detection events e_i(t) = s_i(t) ⊕ s_i(t−1) (v9 §F.2) — the locality requirement of ẋ is met after preprocessing, not before.
class_conditions.falsifier: Trail built directly on raw syndrome stream (no detection-event preprocessing) gives the predicted gFDR signature — implies the locality requirement is met without preprocessing, contrary to the framework's reading rule.

gamut.tau_obs_constraint: Must be longer than syndrome cycle and shorter than logical-error correlation time.

examples: syndrome-stream FDR at sub-threshold physical error rates

classes.name: Toner–Tu active matter with intrinsic self-propulsion

class_conditions.statement: Substrate carries intrinsic self-propulsion (measurable directed velocity v_0 at the single-unit level).
class_conditions.falsifier: No measurable self-propulsion velocity v_0 at the single-unit level.

class_conditions.statement: Operating regime satisfies Pe = v_0·τ_R/a ≫ 1 — propulsion dominates rotational diffusion on the relevant length scale.
class_conditions.falsifier: Substrate runs at low Péclet (Pe ≲ 1) where the MIPS prediction is out-of-scope.

class_conditions.statement: Dynamics are well-described by continuous-time Rescorla–Wagner: V̇ = κ_RW(λ−V).
class_conditions.falsifier: Extinction shows spontaneous, sustained, monotonic growth of associative strength V without re-exposure to the reward schedule (Receipts §20 explicit falsifier).

class_conditions.statement: Reinforcement schedule plays the role of bath (λ conjugate to maintenance budget G_0); cessation drives R_Character quench.
class_conditions.falsifier: Schedule manipulation has no observable effect on chit (substrate not in the RW class).

class_conditions.statement: Lamb stationary closure applies — gain renormalisation G_0^eff = G_0/(1 + Σ ρ_j/ρ_sat) absorbs bath occupancy on timescales fast compared to mode relaxation.
class_conditions.falsifier: Bath fluctuates on timescales comparable to mode relaxation (dynamic-bath regime; the Mori–Zwanzig non-stationary closure applies instead).

class_conditions.statement: Per-mode slow-resource turnover γ_∥ (population decay) is independently measurable.
class_conditions.falsifier: γ_∥ inaccessible by independent measurement — cannot apply per-mode framework readings.

class_conditions.statement: Dynamics are well-described by phase reduction around stable limit cycles (amplitudes slaved).
class_conditions.falsifier: Amplitudes track strongly out of the limit-cycle attractor basin — phase reduction fails.

class_conditions.statement: Effective phase coupling K_AB and detuning Δω are independently measurable.
class_conditions.falsifier: K_AB and Δω inseparable in measurement — cannot localise on the Arnold-tongue.

class_conditions.statement: Substrate's generation times are well-resolved on the τ_obs window — cohort dynamics are not coarse-grained through the observation.
class_conditions.falsifier: Cohort dynamics coarse-grain through the τ_obs window; population reads as static.

class_conditions.statement: Interaction graph is frustration-free (Volterra–Lyapunov stable); no closed cycle with obstructive γ-product.
class_conditions.falsifier: Cycles with obstructive γ-product persist — substrate is k_frust-bearing, ecological-Lyapunov class does not apply.

gamut.tau_obs_constraint: Must resolve generation times of the slowest population.

class_conditions.statement: Substrate operates near the s-regime SOC attractor (the generic feedback-coupled NESS operating point per cdv1 §Pattern formation).
class_conditions.falsifier: Substrate sits far from SOC across protocols with no avalanche statistics or 1/f spectral tail.

class_conditions.statement: Substrate may carry top-down preemption — Cobham–Haken bridge condition (iii) may be violated. Flag is informational, not falsifying.
class_conditions.falsifier: (Not a falsifier — a class-conditional flag that downstream slot-readings inherit.)

gamut.tau_obs_constraint: Must include population time-scales (~ms–s) but exclude single-spike microsecond dynamics.

class_conditions.statement: Substrate operates close to the TUR bound (T ≈ 1).
class_conditions.falsifier: Substrate runs systematically loose (T ≫ 1) under standard conditions — not in the biological-motor TUR-tight class.

class_conditions.statement: Net entropy production ⟨σ⟩ is non-zero and sustained — substrate is in a sustained NESS, not equilibrated.
class_conditions.falsifier: Substrate equilibrates — ⟨σ⟩ → 0.

class_conditions.statement: Arrivals are approximately Poisson (memoryless inter-arrival distribution).
class_conditions.falsifier: Heavy-tailed inter-arrival times observed — the non-Markovian queueing branch applies instead.

class_conditions.statement: Substrate operates loose (T ≫ 1) — engineered margin above the precision-cost bound.
class_conditions.falsifier: Tight TUR observed (T ≈ 1) — substrate is mis-classified; it instances the biological-motor / optimal-encoding regime.

class_conditions.statement: Substrate carries (i) non-reciprocal cross-coupling γ_AB·γ_BA<0, (ii) substrate-native autocatalysis γ_ii<0, (iii) differential diffusion D_B≫D_A (the three Receipts §19 conditions for Turing-class wavelength selection).
class_conditions.falsifier: Any one of the three conditions absent — substrate is not Turing-class; patterning, if observed, has a different mechanism.

class_conditions.statement: Dynamics are spatially extended over scales resolving the predicted Turing wavelength (not well-mixed).
class_conditions.falsifier: Substrate is well-mixed at the patterning length-scale; spatial-instability mechanism inapplicable.

gamut.tau_obs_constraint: Must resolve diffusion times across the patterning domain.

class_conditions.statement: Caputo memory exponent β_mem in the viscoelastic / sub-diffusive band (per Receipts §9 substrate-class fingerprint, roughly β_mem ∈ (0.5, 1) for viscoelastic biological substrates / polymer networks).
class_conditions.falsifier: Substrate measured to have β_mem outside this band (Markovian β=1 or deep-glassy β≈0.5).

class_conditions.statement: Substrate has polymer / matrix scaffolding constraining dynamics — the network is structural, not transient.
class_conditions.falsifier: Substrate is purely fluid; no scaffolding constraint.
